_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission
Discharge summary of last admission for Deflux for VUR

claim.label: Detailed clinical papers along with the treatment given

ppd_preauth.q: Was the earlier discharge summary indicative of follow-up procedure?

common_queries: Earlier discharge summary not indicative of a follow-up procedure for Deflux for VUR.
Detailed clinical notes for pre-authorization are incomplete, missing history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings, or advice for admission.
Discharge summary from the last Deflux for VUR admission is not provided at pre-authorization.
Intravenous urography (IVU) report is missing at the time of claim submission.
Clinical diagnosis of Deflux for VUR followup is not backed by specified clinical manifestations (febrile episodes, anorexia, vomiting, dysuria).

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Deflux for VUR only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation
